question.text: What is the maximum percentage of investable funds that a Category III AIF can invest in one investee company?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Category III AIF cannot invest more than 10% of the investable funds in an Investee Company. **The Trap:** 25% is the limit for Category I & II, not Category III. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** For listed companies, the limit is 10% of either Investable Funds or NAV of the Scheme.
